notes: First vowel team — right-branch leaf #1. Core: rain, tail, day, play.
Biggest single harvest of the program (+75). SHEEP SPELLABLE (name-day). Bee debuts — decodable at debut. Core: see, tree, eat, sea.
ow ambiguity acknowledged (diphthong ow waits at W52); 'know' deferred to W56. Core: boat, goat, snow, grow.
ie bank Fable-authored (pie, tie, die, lie); knight deferred to W56. Core: night, light, high, pie.
Cleanest r-controlled first. Star debuts — decodable at debut (st+ar). Core: star, car, park, farm.
ore bank Fable-authored. Core: corn, fork, more, store.
THE TWO-SYLLABLE GATE OPENS: under, better, sister, teacher, farmer. Core: her, bird, fur, turn.
No new words. Tense-lax contrasts (ship/sheep, hit/heat, pin/pen, hat/hut) — Mandarin has no tense/lax distinction; this week exists FOR the EAL market. Mirror Leaf. Book: Ship or Sheep?
moon/book two-sound ambiguity after the easy teams. 'school' enters as heart word. Core: moon, zoo, book, look.
Owl debuts — decodable at debut (ow+l). Core: out, house, cow, owl.
Smallest family, correctly last of the true teams. WORD #1,000 lands this week — celebrated. Core: coin, oil, boy, toy.
'because' enters as heart word; knew deferred to W56. Core: new, blue, saw, draw.
'why' EARNS ITS LETTERS (heart→decodable, promised at W32). Bank Fable-authored. Core: my, fly, why, happy.
Ghost-letters narrative gift; 'know' finally lands (held since W45). mb bank Fable-authored. Core: knee, write, lamb, thumb.
THE INFLECTION UNLOCK — the cast DOES things at last (running! jumped!). Banks Fable-authored. Core: jumping, played, wishes, running.
Whole-cast finale. POTATO'S APOTHEOSIS — printed for the first time, crowned atop the Pattern Tree. 'question' enters as heart word. Running total 1,192. Core: action, celebration, station.
